loan_contract_no.text: สัญญาเลขที่

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME.prename || sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname AS c_name ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.MEMBERSHIP_NO ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_contract_no ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.real_recieve ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_approve_amount ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.share_coll_amount ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.real_recieve ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_installment_amount ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.period_payment_amount ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_no ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_name ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.total_old_loan ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.total_oldint ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.buy_share ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.total_share_value ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.fee_amount ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_b.member_group_name ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_control ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type_description -- ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.bank_code -- ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.bank_acc_no/ -- ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.remark ,(SELECT (CASE bank_code WHEN '006' THEN 'กรุงไทย' WHEN '025' THEN 'กรุงศรี' ELSE (CASE type_pay_money WHEN 'TRD' THEN 'บัญชีสหกรณ์ฯ' ELSE '' END) END) AS bank_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid WHERE loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) as bank_code
, ( select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) as interest_amount_new
,(select sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) as bank_acc_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!approve_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') as approve_date1 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!approve_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy') as approve_date2 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.approve_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as approve_date FROM SC_LON_M_CONTRACT ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_b ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,SC_LON_M_RULE -- ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank WHERE (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_no) -- and sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id = SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.bank_code AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME.prename_code) AND (SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_requestment_no = SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.loan_requestment_no) AND (SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_type = SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.loan_type) AND (SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.MEMBERSHIP_NO = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AND (SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_a.member_group_control = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP_b.member_group_no) AND (SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND (SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.rec_rep_status = '1') -- and ( SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_contract_no between '!loan_contract_no_1!' and '!loan_contract_no_2!') /*WHERE*/

r_tnma_member_detail_nest_loan.sql: SELECT (CASE SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.DESCRIPTION WHEN SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.loan_contract_no THEN 'ดอกเบี้ยรับล่วงหน้า' ELSE SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.DESCRIPTION END)as DESCRIPTION , sc_com_m_receipt_item.seq_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.money_type_id = 'CLR' ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0' ) )

r_tnma_member_detail_nest_clearother.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.seq_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.money_type_id = 'CLR' ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id <> 'PL' ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0' ) )

r_tnma_member_detail_nest_loan_ref.sql: SELECT --(CASE SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id WHEN 'PL' THEN 'ดอกเบี้ยล่วงหน้า' ELSE SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.description END) as description , SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.description, -- (SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.period_payment_amount) as c_period, (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) as c_int, (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) as c_prin , SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_amount as c_period FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and -- ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.money_type_id = 'CLR' ) AND -- ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0' ) )

r_tnma_member_detail_nest_loancoll.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no as typename --,(CASE sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code WHEN --'01' THEN sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description WHEN --'02' THEN 'หุ้นค้ำประกัน' WHEN --'12' THEN sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description -- WHEN '13' THEN sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description END) as collateral_description ,(case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '02' then 'หุ้นค้ำประกัน' else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description end )as collateral_description
from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = {0} order by ((sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no)::numeric) asc
